name: 05-20-stage2-rvv-strided-store-memory-executable-slice
title: Stage2 RVV strided-store memory executable slice
description: Implement one bounded i32 SEW32 LMUL m1 unit-load to runtime-strided destination-store RVV executable slice from typed tcrv_rvv body through provider/materializer/generated bundle and ssh rvv correctness evidence.
creator: codex
notes: Completed bounded unit-load to runtime destination-strided-store RVV slice. Real ssh rvv PASS for explicit and pre-realized generated bundles at counts 7,16,23 with dst_stride=3; harness checks active strided writes, skipped-lane sentinels, and tail sentinels.
